summary: P0 Security Events API Testing COMPLETE - All 22 tests passed. Verified new /api/security/* endpoints (events, metrics, failed-logins, event-types, locked-accounts, unlock-account, report) are properly secured with authentication and tenant isolation.

security_events_api.notes: All endpoints properly secured with auth (401) and tenant isolation (403)

authentication_required.notes: All security endpoints return 401 for unauthenticated requests

tenant_isolation.notes: Super admin without tenant context correctly receives 403 with message 'This endpoint requires tenant context'

security_router_integration.notes: Security router properly imported and registered in server.py (lines 1349-1350)

login_rate_limiting.notes: Login endpoint exists with rate limiting decorator (@limiter.limit)

mobile_integrity_checks.notes: App.js calls runIntegrityChecks() on startup. integrityService.js checks for jailbreak/root detection. securityService.js reports events to backend.

features: Security events API for admin access to logs
Failed login tracking with IP aggregation
Client security event reporting from mobile app

critical_code_review_comments: PASS: security.py correctly uses get_tenant_db_for_user dependency for tenant isolation
PASS: All admin-only endpoints check role in ['admin', 'super_admin', 'superadmin', 'college_admin']
PASS: Security events exclude MongoDB _id field with {'_id': 0} projection
PASS: Rate limiting in place for security-sensitive endpoints
PASS: Mobile app runs integrity checks on startup (App.js line 75-94)
PASS: Jailbreak/root detection implemented in integrityService.js
PASS: Client security event reporting implemented in securityService.js
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 security events API complete. All endpoints at /api/security/* are properly secured with authentication (401) and tenant isolation (403). Mobile integrity checks added to App.js. The security endpoints use get_tenant_db_for_user dependency, so they require tenant context - super_admin without tenant code will get 403.
